title: AJAX & JSON
summary: Asynchronous requests with XMLHttpRequest, working with JSON data.

examples.title: JSON.parse
examples.description: Parse a JSON string into an object and display properties.

examples.title: XMLHttpRequest GET
examples.description: Load text from a file when you click the button. Requires a local server (npx serve .).
examples.note: Use Run example with a local server. Click Load Content inside the preview.

practice.description: Parse this JSON array and list each name in the page.
